name: gcp-list-projects
description:
List Google Cloud projects visible to the authenticated account via the Cloud Resource Manager v3 projects:search API. Filter with CRM search syntax (e.g. 'state:ACTIVE'), cap results, and receive structured metadata (project_id, display_name, state, create_time). Building block for cloud-inventory / cost-attribution / drift-detection workflows.

Requires a vault:// reference to a Google Cloud OAuth access token in the AUTH_HEADER config key. The controller resolves + refreshes the token at dispatch time — you only need to pass the vault path.

AUTH_HEADER.description: vault:// path to the OAuth access token wrapped in 'Bearer ' (e.g. 'Bearer vault://oauth/google_cloud/{user_id}/{provider_key}/access_token'). The controller resolves the vault reference and refreshes the token if expired.

QUERY.description: Cloud Resource Manager search query. Common: 'state:ACTIVE' (default), 'displayName:prod*', 'parent:folders/1234'. Empty → all visible projects.

MAX_RESULTS.description: Maximum projects to return (1–50). Bounds the single-page projects:search request.

setup_instructions.title: Enable the Cloud Resource Manager API
setup_instructions.detail: In https://console.cloud.google.com, enable the Cloud Resource Manager API and configure OAuth consent with the 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform.read-only' scope.

setup_instructions.title: Authorize the integration
setup_instructions.detail: Complete the OAuth flow via your Talos integration UI (/api/gcp/connect). The controller stores the access_token + refresh_token at 'oauth/google_cloud/{user_id}/{provider_key}/access_token' and '.../refresh_token', and tracks expiry in integration_credentials.

setup_instructions.title: Configure AUTH_HEADER
setup_instructions.detail: Set AUTH_HEADER to 'Bearer vault://oauth/google_cloud/{your_user_id}/{your_provider_key}/access_token'. The controller resolves the vault path + refreshes the token before dispatching. If you hit 401s, call refresh_oauth_token(vault_path) to force-refresh and read the outcome.
